metrics.name: openadas_neon_full_bundle_finite_fraction
metrics.notes: Neon OpenADAS ionisation/recombination plus radiation tables load fully and finitely.

metrics.name: neon_ionisation_rate_positive
metrics.notes: Neon ionisation reaction rate is finite and positive on a representative edge sample state.

metrics.name: neon_recombination_rate_positive
metrics.notes: Neon recombination reaction rate is finite and positive on a representative edge sample state.

metrics.name: neon_openadas_radiation_terms_finite
metrics.notes: Ionisation and recombination energy-loss channels are finite on the native OpenADAS evaluation path.

metrics.name: tokamak_dthene_rhs_neon_density_exact
metrics.notes: Direct tokamak D/T/He/Ne RHS rung matches the committed neon density baseline exactly.

metrics.name: tokamak_dthene_rhs_neon_pressure_exact
metrics.notes: Direct tokamak D/T/He/Ne RHS rung matches the committed neon pressure baseline exactly.

metrics.name: tokamak_dthene_rhs_electron_pressure_exact
metrics.notes: Electron pressure remains exact on the same neon-enabled direct tokamak RHS compare surface.
